summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ventura Fresh Laundry CRM application. Backend API tests achieved 96.4% success rate (27/28 tests passed). Frontend UI tests passed completely with successful login, registration, navigation, and CRUD operations. All core features working correctly with Spanish UI as required.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Web server returned an unknown error - likely server configuration issue

passed_tests: Lead management (create, update, convert to customer)
Frontend user login with valid credentials
Data integration between frontend and backend
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix quotes endpoint returning 520 error - likely server configuration issue preventing B2B quote creation. All other functionality working correctly.
